mapper.select: SELECT id, provider_code, provider_name, api_base_url, api_token_cipher, token_mask, default_model, connect_status, status, remark, create_time, update_time, create_user, update_user, is_deleted FROM ai_provider_config WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = FALSE

SELECT id, provider_code, provider_name, api_base_url, api_token_cipher, token_mask, default_model, connect_status, status, remark, create_time, update_time, create_user, update_user, is_deleted FROM ai_provider_config WHERE provider_code = #{providerCode} AND is_deleted = FALSE

SELECT id, provider_code, provider_name, api_base_url, api_token_cipher, token_mask, default_model, connect_status, status, remark, create_time, update_time, create_user, update_user, is_deleted FROM ai_provider_config WHERE is_deleted = FALSE AND status = 1 AND connect_status = 'SUCCESS' ORDER BY update_time DESC, id DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE ai_provider_config SET provider_code = #{providerCode}, provider_name = #{providerName}, api_base_url = #{apiBaseUrl}, api_token_cipher = #{apiTokenCipher}, token_mask = #{tokenMask}, default_model = #{defaultModel}, connect_status = #{connectStatus}, status = #{status}, remark = #{remark}, update_time = #{updateTime}, update_user = #{updateUser} WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = FALSE
UPDATE ai_provider_config SET connect_status = #{connectStatus}, default_model = #{defaultModel}, update_time = #{updateTime}, update_user = #{updateUser} WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = FALSE
